reference: AT LENGTH THE LAND HAD QUITE DISAPPEARED NOTHING COULD BE SEEN BUT THE SKY OVERHEAD AND A VAST EXPANSE OF WATER ALL AROUND AND THE PASSENGERS FOUND LEISURE TO TURN THEIR ATTENTION UPON EACH OTHER
text: At length the land had quite disappeared: nothing could be seen but the sky overhead, and the vast expanse of water all round; and the passengers found leisure to turn their attention upon each other.
